title: [FIRRTL] Export Literal Identifiers Correctly
body:
The literal identifiers that were added in https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/c5ce48d54d4b566885751420c6dd19d59c0ee6b3 do not currently export correctly (nor round trip correctly). Any identifiers which have a leading numeric character should be escaped with backticks during export.

Consider:
```
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input `0`: {`1`: UInt<1>}
    output `2`: UInt<1>

    `2` <= `0`.`1`
```

This will export as (`firtool Bar.fir -parse-only | circt-translate -export-firrtl`):
```
circuit Foo :
  module Foo :
    input 0 : { 1 : UInt<1> }
    output 2 : UInt<1>

    2 <= 0.1 @[<stdin> 5:7]
```

When it should export exactly like the input.
